name: Schokoladenpretzel (Chocolate Pretzels)
recipeInstructions:
----------------------
Cocoa Frosting:
2 tbsp Cocoa Powder
1 1/4 cups Confectioners' Sugar
2 tablespoons Butter or Margarine, Melted
1/2 tsp Vanilla Extract
Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in the egg, vanilla, and milk. Sift the cocoa powder and flour together. Mix into the butter mixture until thoroughly blended. Chill the dough for about 30 minutes until firm enough to handle.
Using 2 tablespoons of dough, roll a rope about 12 inches long between your hands. Shape into a pretzel by making a loop about 1 1/2 inches in diameter by crossing the ends and leaving 1-inch tails. Flip the loop down over the crossed ends and press firmly into place. Place the pretzels on greased baking sheets. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes.
Make the frosting: Mix cocoa powder and confectioners' sugar. Gradually stir in butter and vanilla. If the frosting is too thick, thin with milk. When the pretzels are cool, spread with Cocoa Frosting. Makes approximately 2 dozen pretzels.
